testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Index 11 out of bounds for length 10

testcase.failure: java.lang.ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException: Index 11 out of bounds for length 10 at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.add(ArrayList.java:485) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.add(ArrayList.java:497) at com.aventstack.extentreports.AbstractProcessor.onSystemInfoAdded(AbstractProcessor.java:104) at com.aventstack.extentreports.ExtentReports.setSystemInfo(ExtentReports.java:299) at hooks.Hooks.setup(Hooks.java:34)
